elements.original_description: A person standing with arms outstretched, surrounded by glowing yellow thought bubbles floating upwards. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: High-quality photograph of a person standing with arms outstretched, surrounded by glowing yellow thought bubbles floating upwards. Cinematic lighting, soft focus on the person, a sense of gentle absorption and receiving energy. High resolution, sharp detail, no text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks, professional studio background.

elements.original_description: The same person now with arms relaxed, the thought bubbles absorbed into their body, glowing faintly. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: High-quality photograph of the same person now with arms relaxed at their sides, the glowing yellow thought bubbles fully absorbed into their body, causing a faint internal glow to emanate from their chest. Cinematic lighting, a calm and satisfied mood, soft bokeh background. High resolution, sharp detail, no text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
